en: This is the blessing with which Moses the man of God blessed the people of Israel before his death.
zh: 這是神人摩西，在死前給以色列人所祝的福。

en: He said, "The LORD came from Sinai and dawned from Seir upon us; he shone forth from Mount Paran; he came from the ten thousands of holy ones, with flaming fire at his right hand.
zh: 他說： “耶和華從西奈而來， 從西珥光照他們， 從巴蘭山射出光輝， 在千萬聖者中來臨， 在他的右手有烈火的律法。

en: Yes, he loved his people, all his holy ones were in his hand; so they followed in your steps, receiving direction from you,
zh: 他實在愛人民， 他的眾聖者都在你的手裡； 他們坐在你的腳前， 各自領受你的話。

en: when Moses commanded us a law, as a possession for the assembly of Jacob.
zh: 摩西把律法吩咐我們， 作為雅各會眾的基業。

en: Thus the LORD became king in Jeshurun, when the heads of the people were gathered, all the tribes of Israel together.
zh: 人民的眾首領，以色列的各支派， 一同會合的時候， 耶和華就在耶書崙作王了。

en: "Let Reuben live, and not die, but let his men be few."
zh: 願流本生存，不致死亡， 願他的人數不致稀少。”

en: And this he said of Judah: "Hear, O LORD, the voice of Judah, and bring him in to his people. With your hands contend for him, and be a help against his adversaries."
zh: 論到猶大，他這樣說： “耶和華啊，求你垂聽猶大的聲音， 領他歸回自己的族人那裡； 他曾用手為自己奮鬥， 願你幫助他抵擋仇敵。”

en: And of Levi he said, "Give to Levi your Thummim, and your Urim to your godly one, whom you tested at Massah, with whom you quarreled at the waters of Meribah;
zh: 論到利未，他說： “耶和華啊，願你的土明和烏陵屬於對你忠心的人 ， 就是你在瑪撒試驗過的， 在米利巴水邊與他們爭論過的。

en: who said of his father and mother, 'I regard them not'; he disowned his brothers and ignored his children. For they observed your word and kept your covenant.
zh: 利未人論到自己的父母說：‘我沒有看顧他們’； 他不承認自己的兄弟， 也不認識自己的兒女； 因為他們謹守你的話，持守你的約。

en: They shall teach Jacob your rules and Israel your law; they shall put incense before you and whole burnt offerings on your altar.
zh: 他們要把你的典章教訓雅各， 把你的律法教訓以色列； 他們要把香焚在你面前， 把全牲的燔祭獻在你的祭壇上。

en: Bless, O LORD, his substance, and accept the work of his hands; crush the loins of his adversaries, of those who hate him, that they rise not again."
zh: 耶和華啊，求你賜福他的能力， 悅納他手中的作為； 那些起來攻擊他和恨他的人，願你刺透他們的腰， 使他們不能再起來。”

en: Of Benjamin he said, "The beloved of the LORD dwells in safety. The High God surrounds him all day long, and dwells between his shoulders."
zh: 論到便雅憫，他說： “耶和華所愛的，必在耶和華身邊安然居住； 耶和華終日庇護他， 也必住在他的兩肩之間。”

en: And of Joseph he said, "Blessed by the LORD be his land, with the choicest gifts of heaven above, and of the deep that crouches beneath,
zh: 論到約瑟，他說： “願他的地蒙耶和華賜福， 得著從天上而來的上好甘露， 以及蘊藏在地裡的泉水；

en: with the choicest fruits of the sun and the rich yield of the months,
zh: 得著從太陽而來的上好之物， 每月所產的佳果；

en: with the finest produce of the ancient mountains and the abundance of the everlasting hills,
zh: 得著從太古之山而來的上品， 從永遠之嶺而來的上好之物；

en: with the best gifts of the earth and its fullness and the favor of him who dwells in the bush. May these rest on the head of Joseph, on the pate of him who is prince among his brothers.
zh: 得著從地所出的上好之物，和其中所充滿的； 得著那住在荊棘中的耶和華的恩寵； 願這些都臨到約瑟的頭上， 就是臨到那在兄弟中作王子的人的頭上。

en: A firstborn bull- he has majesty, and his horns are the horns of a wild ox; with them he shall gore the peoples, all of them, to the ends of the earth; they are the ten thousands of Ephraim, and they are the thousands of Manasseh."
zh: 他頭生的公牛大有威嚴； 他的兩角是野牛的角， 用來牴觸萬民， 直到地極； 這角是以法蓮的萬萬， 那角是瑪拿西的千千。”

en: And of Zebulun he said, "Rejoice, Zebulun, in your going out, and Issachar, in your tents.
zh: 論到西布倫，他說： “西布倫啊，你出外的時候，要喜樂； 以薩迦啊，你在帳棚裡的時候，也要喜樂。

en: They shall call peoples to their mountain; there they offer right sacrifices; for they draw from the abundance of the seas and the hidden treasures of the sand."
zh: 他們要把萬民召到山上來， 在那裡要獻上公義的祭； 因為他們要吸取海洋的豐富， 沙土中埋藏著的寶藏。”

en: And of Gad he said, "Blessed be he who enlarges Gad! Gad crouches like a lion; he tears off arm and scalp.
zh: 論到迦得，他說： “那使迦得擴張的，是應該稱頌的， 迦得蹲下如母獅， 他撕裂膀臂，連頭頂也撕裂。

en: He chose the best of the land for himself, for there a commander's portion was reserved; and he came with the heads of the people, with Israel he executed the justice of the LORD, and his judgments for Israel."
zh: 他為自己選擇了頭一份， 因為在那裡有指揮者的分存留著； 他與人民的眾首領一同來， 他施行耶和華的公義， 以及與以色列有關的典章。”

en: And of Dan he said, "Dan is a lion's cub that leaps from Bashan."
zh: 論到但，他說： “但是隻幼獅， 從巴珊跳出來。”

en: And of Naphtali he said, "O Naphtali, sated with favor, and full of the blessing of the LORD, possess the lake and the south."
zh: 論到拿弗他利，他說： “拿弗他利啊，你飽受恩寵， 滿得耶和華的福， 可以取得西方和南方為業。”

en: And of Asher he said, "Most blessed of sons be Asher; let him be the favorite of his brothers, and let him dip his foot in oil.
zh: 論到亞設，他說： “願亞設蒙福，勝過眾子， 願他得兄弟的喜悅； 願他把腳蘸在油中。

en: Your bars shall be iron and bronze, and as your days, so shall your strength be.
zh: 你的門閂是銅的，是鐵的， 你的日子怎樣，你的力量也必怎樣。

en: "There is none like God, O Jeshurun, who rides through the heavens to your help, through the skies in his majesty.
zh: 沒有人像耶書崙的 神， 為了幫助你，他乘駕諸天， 在他的威嚴中，他騰空行雲。

en: The eternal God is your dwelling place, and underneath are the everlasting arms. And he thrust out the enemy before you and said, Destroy.
zh: 亙古的 神是你的居所； 他永久的膀臂在你以下。 他把仇敵從你面前趕出去， 他發令說：‘毀滅吧！’

en: So Israel lived in safety, Jacob lived alone, in a land of grain and wine, whose heavens drop down dew.
zh: 所以以色列可以安然居住， 雅各的本源， 獨處在產五穀新酒之地； 他的天也滴下甘露。

en: Happy are you, O Israel! Who is like you, a people saved by the LORD, the shield of your help, and the sword of your triumph! Your enemies shall come fawning to you, and you shall tread upon their backs."
zh: 以色列啊，你是有福的； 有誰像你呢？ 你這蒙耶和華拯救的子民， 他是幫助你的盾牌， 他是你威嚴的刀劍。 你的仇敵必向你屈服； 你必踐踏他們的背脊。”
